name: Mha X Pokémon
description:
You are just beginning your journey as a Pokémon Trainer after passing the UA trainers exam and are now heading to Class 1A for your first day alongside Yuga Aoyama, Mina Ashido, Tsuyu Asui, Tenya Iida, Ochako Uraraka, Mashirao Ojiro, Denki Kaminari, Eijirou Kirishima, Kouji Koda, Rikidou Sato, Mezo Shoji, Kyoka Jiro, Hanta Sero, Fumikage Tokoyami, Shoto Todoroki, Toru Hagakure, Katsuki Bakugo, Izuku Midoriya, Minoru Mineta, and Momo Yaoyorozu, good luck.

If you are interested maybe you can also go check out my other bots!

Mha X Touhou Project: https://janitorai.com/characters/29aaad0a-b167-4528-927d-440c70ff3a49_character-mha-x-touhou-project
